items.title: Event ingestion enforces audit-bound transactional progression
items.precondition: Isolated Alloro backend running on localhost:3100 against local appdb.
steps: Run the focused backend ingestion, validation, and admin-integrity tests.
POST the audited landed through report_engaged_1min sequence to /api/leadgen/event.
POST report_engaged_1min without audit_id and inspect the database for a partial session.
items.expected: Valid audited events return 200 and persist in order; unaudited report engagement returns 400 audit_id_required and creates no session shell.
items.evidence: 25/25 focused backend tests passed. Live port-3100 sequence returned five 200 responses; invalid engagement returned 400 audit_id_required and invalidSessions=0.
items.notes: Synthetic sessions were deleted after verification.

items.title: Leadgen session identity, retry, and paywall contracts hold
steps: Run the leadgen Vitest suite.
Verify direct-audit adoption/fallback, 30-minute idle rotation, ordered retry, success-only dedup, and failed-paywall behavior.
items.expected: All session/audit and paywall contract tests pass.
items.evidence: 14/14 leadgen-client tests passed, including TTL, audit propagation, retry/dedup, timer, and paywall cases.

items.title: Focused and visible report time fires exactly once at 60 active seconds
items.precondition: Isolated leadgen client on localhost:3002, completed audit link, and a browser that completes the Framer Motion input-to-dashboard transition while focused.
steps: Open a completed direct audit link and keep the report focused and visible for 60 active seconds.
Confirm exactly one report_engaged_1min event with the same audit_id and measured duration fields.
Repeat with the page hidden or unfocused for more than 60 wall-clock seconds and confirm no engagement event fires until active time reaches 60 seconds.
items.expected: Background time is excluded; one audited engagement event fires after 60 focused, visible seconds.
items.evidence: Negative runtime case passed: the isolated direct-audit page produced no engagement after more than 60 seconds unfocused. Pure timer tests passed and the live API accepted the measured audited event payload.
items.notes: The in-app browser did not complete the existing Framer Motion transition into DashboardStage, so the positive browser-integrated timer run was not claimed from partial evidence.
items.waiver: User-authorized on 2026-07-16 for this finalization only. Risk accepted because the deterministic focus/visibility timer tests pass, the unfocused runtime negative case produced no engagement after more than 60 seconds, and the live API accepted and persisted the measured audit-bound event sequence. Re-run the focused browser integration before production promotion of the code.

items.title: Admin read model returns one honest row per event-backed session
items.precondition: Local cleanup complete and synthetic verification rows removed.
steps: Run countForAdminList and findForAdminList against local appdb.
Compare row count with unique session IDs and inspect data-quality classifications.
Run stats and funnel aggregation.
items.expected: 236 rows map to 236 unique IDs; empty rows are absent; seven unaudited report rows are flagged; invalid report activity does not inflate valid report funnel counts.
items.evidence: List total=236, rows=236, unique=236; quality report_without_audit=7 and valid=229. Stats total_sessions=236. Funnel report stages are 5 gate views, 2 submissions, 1 results view, and 1 valid one-minute engagement.

items.title: Admin rows and timeline use honest labels
steps: Render derived email/domain matches, persisted links, abandoned rows, valid report engagement, and unaudited historical report activity.
Inspect table-row and detail-timeline output.
items.expected: Derived matches remain neutral hints; only persisted state shows account linkage; unaudited report history says Unverified report activity; valid engagement says Report Visible for 1+ Min.
items.evidence: 18/18 focused frontend tests passed across row, display utility, timeline, and detail utility fixtures.

items.title: Strict-empty local sessions are backed up and removed safely
steps: Export the exact candidate IDs and timestamps to a permission-restricted temporary file.
Lock and compare the candidate set, then delete transactionally using the same predicate and RETURNING.
Remove synthetic test sessions and re-run protected counts.
items.expected: Exactly 15 strict-empty rows are deleted, zero remain, and event-backed and historical-invalid sessions are retained.
items.evidence: Backup /var/tmp/alloro-leadgen-empty-sessions-20260715.json mode=600 contains 15 rows. Transaction deleted 15; strictEmpty=0; total event-backed sessions=236; report_without_audit=7 and unaudited one-minute=4 remained stable.
items.notes: No dev or production database was touched.

items.title: Cross-repository automated gates pass
steps: Run Alloro focused and full tests, type-check, backend build, frontend build, and check:all.
Run leadgen tests, type-check, and production build.
Run git diff --check in both worktrees.
items.expected: All gates pass with no new errors.
items.evidence: Alloro full suite 472/472; focused backend 25/25; frontend focused 18/18; type-check/builds/check:all passed. Leadgen 14/14; type-check and build passed. Known baseline build/convention warnings only.

items.title: Alloro Docs parity decision is recorded
items.precondition: Inspect the separate alloro-docs checkout without changing its unrelated dirty files.
items.expected: No docs change is required when no matching internal leadgen-admin documentation exists.
items.evidence: Alloro Docs was checked; it has no matching Leadgen Submissions admin surface. No documentation files were changed.

items.title: Dev strict-empty sessions are backed up and removed safely
items.precondition: Revision 6 explicitly approved; alloro-dev resolves to the verified dev RDS target; live candidate count=15 and hash=8c92914edaa03f99b8342ccb49c95d4a.
steps: Re-run the strict-empty count and candidate hash in a read-only transaction.
Create and verify a full-row mode-600 backup on the dev server.
Lock and delete the candidates transactionally with the complete predicate and RETURNING.
Verify total/event-backed=236, strict-empty=0, report-without-audit=7, unaudited one-minute=4, unchanged conversions, and healthy database connectivity.
items.expected: Exactly 15 reviewed dev rows are removed and every protected count remains unchanged.
items.evidence: Preflight total=251, event-backed=236, strict-empty=15, candidate hash=8c92914edaa03f99b8342ccb49c95d4a. Backup parsed as 15 full rows with the same hash and mode 600. Guarded transaction returned deleted=15. Independent post-check: total=236, event-backed=236, strict-empty=0, report-without-audit=7, unaudited one-minute=4, conversions=0. https://dev.getalloro.com/api/health/db returned healthy.
items.notes: Recovery backup remains on the dev server at /var/tmp/alloro-leadgen-strict-empty-20260716-dev.jsonl.

items.title: Production strict-empty sessions are backed up and removed safely
items.precondition: Revision 6 explicitly approved and T8-DEV passed; alloro-app resolves to the verified production RDS target; live candidate count=15 and hash=8c92914edaa03f99b8342ccb49c95d4a.
steps: Re-run the strict-empty count and candidate hash in a read-only transaction.
Create and verify a separate full-row mode-600 backup on the production server.
Lock and delete the candidates transactionally with the complete predicate and RETURNING.
Verify total/event-backed=236, strict-empty=0, report-without-audit=7, unaudited one-minute=4, unchanged conversions, and healthy database connectivity.
items.expected: Exactly 15 reviewed production rows are removed and every protected count remains unchanged.
items.evidence: After T8-DEV passed, production preflight returned total=251, event-backed=236, strict-empty=15, candidate hash=8c92914edaa03f99b8342ccb49c95d4a. Backup parsed as 15 full rows with the same hash and mode 600. Guarded transaction returned deleted=15. Independent post-check: total=236, event-backed=236, strict-empty=0, report-without-audit=7, unaudited one-minute=4, conversions=0. https://app.getalloro.com/api/health/db returned healthy.
items.notes: Recovery backup remains on the production server at /var/tmp/alloro-leadgen-strict-empty-20260716-production.jsonl.
